creator: gandalf@shopzeus.com
text:
The port  net/vnc installs the vnc.so extension to /usr/local/lib/modules/extensions. For Xorg server 7.2, the correct location should be /usr/local/lib/xorg/modules/extensions.

Fix: 

Change install script? (I'm not sure)
How-To-Repeat: Install vnc from the port and check the location for vnc.so
